mapper.sql: select id, order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, tx_id, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, law_amount, amount, bonus_amount, withdraw_statement, total_amount, exchange_type, from_address, to_address, order_status, up_order_no, up_pay_info, pay_url, merchant_code, pay_merchant_id, pay_channel_id, pay_type_id, type, pay_time, sign_time, sign, create_time from t_order_amount
mapper.insert:
insert into t_order_amount
order_no, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, item_name, tx_id, user_id, tg_user_id, channel_id, shareholder_id, law_amount, amount, bonus_amount, withdraw_statement, total_amount, exchange_type, from_address, to_address, order_status, up_order_no, up_pay_info, pay_url, merchant_code, pay_merchant_id, pay_type_id, pay_channel_id,
type, pay_time, sign_time, sign, create_time,
#{orderNo}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{itemName}, #{txId}, #{userId}, #{channelId}, #{shareholderId}, #{tgUserId}, #{lawAmount}, #{amount}, #{bonusAmount}, #{withdrawStatement}, #{totalAmount}, #{exchangeType}, #{fromAddress}, #{toAddress}, #{orderStatus}, #{upOrderNo}, #{upPayInfo}, #{payUrl}, #{merchantCode}, #{payMerchantId}, #{payTypeId}, #{payChannelId}, #{type}, #{payTime}, #{signTime}, #{sign}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_order_amount where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(0) from t_order_amount where user_id = #{userId} and order_status <= 0 and create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE)
select order_status, COUNT(1) count from t_order_amount where user_id = #{userId} and create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) GROUP BY order_status
